headline: MSCI Strengthens Private Markets Platform Through UBS Partnership
summary: MSCI expands its AI-powered private markets platform with UBS to improve transparency, research, due diligence and portfolio management.

headline: Will MSCI (MSCI) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: MSCI (MSCI) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: MCO Stock: Collect 9.4% Now, In Exchange For 11% Of Upside
summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on your Moody's shares, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for agreeing to sell at a price above today's if the stock gets there.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on MSCI, Raises Price Target to $735
summary: Barclays  analyst Manav Patnaik   maintains MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $700 to $735.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on MSCI, Raises Price Target to $730
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Curtis Nagle   maintains MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $715 to $730.
